no: Replaces Xan's BG2 NPC soundset with an original French voiceover. Optionally removes all other English Xan audio lines including banters and romance.
sum: Enjoy Xan BG2 NPC gameplay with an original French soundset.

co.n: Delete all other English Xan audio lines, inlcuding banter and romance lines
co.no: Removes English Xan audio (banters and romance)

co.n: French soundset for Xan BG2 NPC
co.no: Replaces Xan soundset with French voiceover
